# 项目总控章程模板

```markdown
# Project Control Charter

Project:
Control Mode: Light / Standard / Expanded / ResearchHub
Generated:

## Purpose

-

## Control Authority

The project control window may:

-

The project control window must not:

-

## Enabled Windows

| Window | Purpose | Keep Long-Term |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 总控 | Project coordination and experience sync | Yes |

## Escalation Rules

- Strategy, priority, and tradeoff questions: 策略拟定
- Code implementation: 软件开发
- Learning workflows: 自我学习
- Knowledge organization: 资料整理
- Writing or story work: 写作剧本
- Tooling, skills, plugins, automation: 工具插件
- Cross-project method updates: X3_CodeX 总控

## Experience Sync

Project control should create an experience sync packet when:

- A repeated failure pattern appears.
- A project workflow becomes reusable.
- A prompt or template repeatedly improves outcomes.
- A Codex limitation or boundary becomes clear.

Every experience sync packet must include `Experience Score` and `Stage` based on `docs/workflow/experience-evaluation.md`.

## Safety Rules

- Do not copy full raw materials to X3_CodeX.
- Do not overwrite existing project files without explicit approval.
- Prefer append-only notes for project-control updates.
```
